symbols: fortified city — human defiance and the transience of earthly power and political independence
encircling armies — the overwhelming forces of empire, the clash of temporal authorities
river and hills — the Tuscan landscape as stage for historical drama, the enduring land beneath passing human conflicts
description: A sweeping aerial panorama depicting the city of Florence under siege. The walled city occupies the center of the composition, with the River Arno winding through it. The distinctive dome of the cathedral and numerous towers are visible within the walls. Surrounding the city on all sides, military encampments, fortifications, and troop positions dot the green Tuscan hills. The landscape extends to distant mountains under a hazy sky. The painting serves as both a topographical record and a historical document of the military operation.
